hooks.command: mkdir -p claude_log && echo "## Session — $(date '+%H:%M') ($(if [ $(date '+%H') -lt 12 ]; then echo morning; elif [ $(date '+%H') -lt 17 ]; then echo afternoon; else echo evening; fi))" >> claude_log/session-handoff-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md

hooks.prompt: Context is about to be compacted. IMMEDIATELY write a mini-handoff using the Edit tool to append to claude_log/session-handoff-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d).md. Include: ### Done, ### Pending, ### Decisions, ### Gotchas sections. Be concise but complete.

hooks.command: cd /Users/petersterkenburg/Documents/GitHub/Discord-stoat-ferry && echo '--- Last 5 commits ---' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo '(no commits yet)' && echo '' && HANDOFF=claude_log/session-handoff-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').md && if [ -f "$HANDOFF" ]; then echo "--- Today's handoff exists: $HANDOFF ---" && tail -3 "$HANDOFF"; else echo '(no handoff file for today)'; fi
